tutorials.title: Section 1: Start Guide
tutorials.description: Use this orientation section to reopen the path-first home page, or jump directly to the background pages and guide branches when you already know what you need.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: WMS lifecycle, QA, and publishing flow
tutorials.description: Explains workshop statuses, approval handoffs, stakeholder QA, and publishing flow before authors begin the hands-on workflow.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: GitHub foundations
tutorials.description: Explains the Oracle LiveLabs GitHub model, including repositories, forks, clones, and the standard authoring flow before authors start execution labs.
